headline: Norfolk Southern to upgrade dozens of locomotives
summary: Norfolk Southern and Progress Rail to upgrade 96 DC-traction locomotives to AC, part of a fleet transformation strengthening operations and supporting sustainable shipping. The post Norfolk Southern to upgrade dozens of locomotives appeared first on FreightWaves.

headline: Atlas Energy Solutions (AESI) Stock Is Up, What You Need To Know
summary: Shares of proppant sand producer Atlas Energy Solutions (NYSE:AESI) jumped 3.8% in the afternoon session after the company announced it entered into a significant agreement with Caterpillar Inc. to secure approximately $840 million worth of power generation equipment.

headline: 1 Cash-Producing Stock to Own for Decades and 2 Facing Challenges
summary: While strong cash flow is a key indicator of stability, it doesn’t always translate to superior returns. Some cash-heavy businesses struggle with inefficient spending, slowing demand, or weak competitive positioning.

raw.headline: 1 Cash-Producing Stock to Own for Decades and 2 Facing Challenges

headline: ETFs With Yields Above 10% Using Completely Different Strategies
summary: With the federal funds rate sitting at 3.75% and the 10-year Treasury yielding 4.13%, investors hunting for meaningful income have to venture well beyond government bonds. Three ETFs currently delivering above 10% yields do so through mechanisms that have almost nothing in common with each other, which makes them worth understanding on their own terms ... ETFs With Yields Above 10% Using Completely Different Strategies

headline: Caterpillar Power Deal With Atlas Highlights Energy Growth And Investor Questions
summary: Caterpillar has agreed a Global Framework Agreement with Atlas Energy Solutions to supply about 1.4 gigawatts of power generation assets. The agreement is valued at approximately $840 million, with deliveries scheduled from 2027 through 2029. The deal focuses on large scale power infrastructure to support growing electricity needs in the US. Caterpillar (NYSE:CAT) is extending its reach in power generation with this long term supply agreement, adding another leg to a business often...
